# **\--Book 5 \- Wild Side--**

# **Prologue**

* ## Neferteri with Nina, back at Sanbi castle.

  * Neferteri tells her that Eori has been behaving badly, and she needs all the support she can get.  
  * Nina says she will do it. She then asks why they are hiding with Nari gel.  
  * Neferteri says that it is super secret research, and that other kingdoms will try to steal it. That is why they need to keep it super secret.  
  * Neferteri says to keep it a secret from father as well. Nina giggles, “okay\!”

# **Chapter 1 \- Prey**

* ## Harry 7-A running through the forest. Autumn colors, leaves starting to fall.

  * Harry ran, and ran, and ran some more. He does not remember even how long he has been running. His legs began to feel heavy, his body grew heavy as well. Soon after, his balance became uncontrollable, and he crashed against a tree, and fell on the ground.  
  * He breathed heavily, as the queue of pain, all blocked by the pure adrenaline rush, began to dequeue all at once into his mind. His feet, the worst offender, have been leaking blood for a while, leaving a trail behind. Not exactly too recognizable to the eye, as it rather quickly blended into the sea of leaves being carried by the constant chilly wind.  
  * Harry brought himself to a sit up, and looked at the bottom of his feet. Sticks, and stones encrusted on his feet like a jewel, a painfully macabre one. He pulled on one, the pain felt like a needle going through the bone, followed immediately by a warm pounding sensation that tickled his feet to no end. The accelerated healing made him laugh, cry, and agonize all at once.   
  * One after another, he cleaned his feet, but with a caveat that the healing was growing slower with each one of them.

* ## Harry 7-A is about to eat a delicious looking fruit that the Bagarisas are screaming at him about. He still eats then pukes his guts out minutes later.

  * Harry walking through the forest, with hand on stomach, looking at a fruit that appears too delicious to be true.  
  * Harry eats his fill. He feels amazing. Like no other. He looks around, forest all around. *What should I do? Where do I go?* He sees the sisters again. He remembers the moment Katsumi kicked him out.   
  * A sinking feeling envelopes Harry. He starts walking, but the more he walks the worse the feeling gets. His saliva grows denser, his throat clenches, and his stomach turns  
  * Harry holds himself against a tree and pukes his guts out. He feels even weaker now.  
  * He spits and begins walking again. Aimless looking at the greying skies.

* ## Harry 7-A, at the base of a large tree, trying to stay away from the rain as night approaches He has fires on his fingertips. Drawn praying Wozen eyes in the bg.

  * ![][image1]  
  * The cold rain hits Harry’s skin, but if Harry closed his eyes, it felt like ice cubes trying to pierce his skin. The fire on his fingertips is his only salvation, but   
  * A passing wind only makes it worse, taking away his concentration, and with it the fire of his fingertips.  
  * A cold feeling brings a chill to Harry. He tries to concentrate on the fire again, but he is shaking too much. The bitter cold takes over his mind every time.  
  * Harry feels something on his left, he moves his head. “AGRHGHRHHRHGR”  
  * A toothy mouth flashed on his vision, bringing him to the ground. Harry felt the warmth again, but of his own blood quickly squirting through his neck.  
  * *I don’t wanna die\! I don’t wanna die\!* Harry flew his arms around, hitting the beast right in the eyes.  
  * The beast jumped back. Harry gurgled blood as he put his hand on his neck. The beast used its paw, and sharp claws at Harry’s gut.  
  * Harry felt his intestines eject from his belly, and warm his skin. The sudden throbbing pain of his gut began to fade, and his whole body began to warm up. Harry, with his last strength, put his hand against the beast and screamed—or rather gurgled loudly—as the flame took over his fingers, then flashed through his whole forearm, before flaming out.  
  * Harry’s forearm slumped towards the ground, and so did Harry’s head forward, as he. Harry Sanbi, died in the middle of “butt fuck nowhere”

# **Chapter 2 \- Penitence**

* ## Sisters walking on the road as the sun rises. Katsumi pulling the Katsuki.

  * The short haired sister pulls herself away from the long sister and starts walking back.  
  * Katsumi grabs her. She tries to fight herself free.  
  * “Too late now\! Harry’s dead meat\! He’s not gonna survive the night.”  
  * The Katsuki pulls weak punches on her sister.  
  * She takes then like it’s nothing. “Don’t you realize we had to leave him behind\! He became luggage the moment he hit the ground hard\!”  
  * Sister keeps punching her. “One. No\! Two. Harry. Savior.”  
  * Katsumi holds her hands. “All right. Cut it out\! Harry is not a savior. He's nobody like us, and what does nobody do? They save themselves\!”  
  * Silent tears pour out of her sister as her imprisoned hands calms down. “One. Trust Broken. Two. No Sister.”  
  * “What are you talking about? I am your sister\! Listen Here\! I just want us to be free\! Emelia, Arukia, and all the other Red Winga people are full of shit\!”  
  * The sister hangs her head. Tears fall out as she goes silent.  
  * The Katsumi. “There’s no coming back now. C’mon. Let’s go.”

* ## Sisters sketchy people from Black Magina in egua rideback.

  * Katsumi fights verbally. Triggers the ire of the bandits. They endup drawing their swords after she refuses to come with them to work at a farm, and the bandits realize they are Red Winga whores.

* ## Sisters fleeing from bandits. Raining.

  * The Katsumi is pulling the Katsuki along, they run.  
  * The Katsuki pulls herself away, and stops dead in her tracks. “ONE\! ENOUGH\! TWO\! KILL—ME\!”  
  * The Katsumi slaps her sister, then pulls her, but she won’t go. “C’mon\! C’MON\!”  
  * The Katsuki resists her sister. She frees herself and starts walking towards the incoming bandits.  
  * The Katsumi. “All right\! FINE\! SUIT YOURSELF\!”  
  * The Katsumi runs away, she bits her lips in anger as she flees with all the strength she has left, but her sister’s face keeps coming back to her, haunting her. She trips and falls into the mud. Her body strength is waning. She tries to get up, but she feels a sharp thing poking her back.  
  * A hoarse voice invades her brain. “I like ‘dem tight\!”  
  * A thunderstorm roars through the skies.  
  * “Hey Fuckface\! Can’t you see they are Red Winga property?”  
  * “So what? They are whores anyways\!”  
  * “Red Winga Whores\! Can’t you imagine how much info they have?”  
  * “And?”  
  * “And we can gather information from them you retarded Brunto. Let’s go\! I knew I spotted gold.”

# **Chapter 3 \- Payback's a bitch and a half.**

* ## Bagarisas heals Harry \#8-A. The Bagarisas all seem lean, thinner.

  * Harry sees Bagarisa kissing him. He pushes it away, screaming. They kinda stink.  
  * The bagarisas oinks at hin, as if complaining of the bad treatment.  
  * Sounds of animals in the distance, the smell of rotting leaves in the bg. He glances at his shirt, or what is left of it. He sits up against the same tree as before, and touches his body. Everything is back where it is supposed to bem but his even thinner now. As a matter of fact, two of the Bagarisas are also quite lean compared to the rest of them. *They healed me\!* Harry moves towards the underweight bagarisas, and hugs them “I’m sorry\! I’m sorry\! I didn’t know\!”  
  * Oinks of understanding, if such a thing can be inferred, came from the two Bagarisas. The others, including a female one, threw a spell against the foliage above,  cursing fruits to fall over, Harry protected his head, and sure enough a fruit came crashing down against his hand, then fell by his groin.  
  * Harry rubbed the pain, then picked up the fruit, and was about to jam into his mouth when he remembered his last encounter. He watched the Bagarisa eat it first, specifically that they were just eating the white interior.  
  * Harry followed suit, and he almost cummed from how good it was.  
  * He, and the bagarisas, stripped the tree of all its fruits.

* ## Harry with Bagarisas getting ready to sleep, all of them pretty full.

  * Harry feels the comfort of the situation. They stunk, but not so bad anymore. Maybe Harry's nose stopped working, but who cared. Harry felt an amazing comfort and protection. The cold wind now felt like a cool breeze of the A/C keeping the warmth of a cozy blanket just right.  
  * One of the Bagarisas stood up. His back lit up on fire. The others realized too, and all seemed to be pretty defensive. 

* ## Two Wozens attack the Bagarisas. 

  * In a flash, the Bagarisas, and wozes began attacking one another.  
  * Harry saw one of the Bagarises, the same one who healed him, agonize over its death, just like Harry did.  
  * A anger, hatred brewed inside him.  
  * Harry screamed as he threw himself against the Wozen from the back. With a firm tackle, Harry’s hand lit up on fire and began burning the Wozen alive. They struggled even more.  
  * Harry ended up killing the Wozen by burning his hand against its face & mouth.

* ## Harry 8-A has wood ready to go, with chunks of meat, and fur shoved in a makeshift stick on the side of the fire.

  * Piece of bloodied stone on the side.  
  * Harry looks kinda disgusted by the result, but he eats it anyway. He spits fur.  
  * The bagarisas want some. He gives it all to them. They clean their plate.  
  * Harry. “Can you guys help me out of here?”  
  * The bagarisas oinks back.  
  * Harry: Wait*. Where would I even go?*  
  * Bagarisa oinks some more. They point towards a specific direction. Harry follows them.

# **Chapter 4 \- Unwanted job**

* ## Kibe with his captain guards going through their daily jobs.

  * Kibe. “That’s it. You can all go now.”  
  * Captains all standup, refusing to leave.  
  * Kibe. “What? We’re done with the city safety debriefing.”  
  * One of the captain guards approaches Kibe. “We want you to retire.”  
  * Kibe. “Sure. How do I do that?”  
  * The whole room goes silent, and look at each other. Murmurs over each other, about what needs to happen, slowly fills the room. A distinct voice, perhaps because it is the only one with confidence, speaks in the back of the room, but does not reach everyone. A sudden sharp clear of the throat, from that same voice, cuts through all the arguments. “According to Sanbi Law, only an apprentice can replace a courtroom scientist.”  
  * {JWK} Name  
  * Kibe. “All right then, you’re now my apprentice.” Kibe glances at the moving clouds in the distance, then back at the young, confident man. “Now you're the courtroom scientist.”  
  * Everyone in the room turns to the new courtroom scientist. He slowly shakes his head. “You’re missing a few steps. First, the 3 others need to approve a new apprentice. Second, a public hair paint must occur. Third. you need to train me to be up to par. Fourth, You resign publicly, then I take over the cargo in a public event too. That one can be the same.”  
  * Kibe “Let’s do that then. Let’s go get the approval. Everyone else, just go already.”  
  * The young man. “Not so easy. You need to create a letter summarizing all my qualities, and why I am the one.”  
  * Kibe groans. “How do I write this letter?”  
  * “I can show you.”

* ## Kibe & Huneo at the meeting with Neferteri, Itagiba, Eiri.

  * They all approve except Neferteri. She drills him with questions. Eiri asks if she suspects Huneo. She says that this is all happening too fast.  
  * Neferteri clears her throat. “The law was followed to the letter, albeit pretty hastily. My voting has no bearing on the matter. Shall we continue with the topic?”  
  * Eiri looks at the paper, when the jovial guy says “Arranging the ceremony. I would like it to be done in two days.”  
  * Itagiba “That soon? But there would not be enough time to advertise it.”  
  * Neferteri keeps her suspicious looks, and goes silent. Huneo points at his massive reformation list. “There’s no time to be jerking around.”  
  * Eiri then talks about getting a day off to see Coema depart. Neferteri does not like even hearing the name. She just holds her badge, and tells Eiri to not bring Coema here.

* ## Kibe & Huneo in the ceremony.

  * Kibe. “I’m out.”  
  * Guy in the bg. “Man\! You suck\!”  
  * Another person. A strong, tall Darfaries “Yeah\! I give you an amethyst If you could suck me as much you did on this job. hahahah”  
  * Kibe pauses, almost as if taking a mental picture of the person in question, before heading off stage.  
  * The new guy comes in, and makes a long speech. The crowd cuts him off. “Sanbi Shit\! Are you gonna talk all day or what? I got a fish to gut\!”  
  * The new guy skips over several pages. “Thank you all, and—and I hope to earn your trust.”  
  * The crowd erratically, but energetically applauds as they look at one another. They are not quite sure of what to make of this Forway lookalike uptight guy.  
  * “Just—just one more thing. I will nominate Kibe as my apprentice.”  
  * Kibe, walking off in the distance, turns around. He thinks his ears just stopped working.  
  * “Kibe is an exceptional guy when it comes to following specific directions, so he would be my perfect right-hand. Oh which I will officially introduce a vote for a position rename as well.”  
  * The crowd stares at Kibe.  
  * Kibe “What?”  
  * The jovial guy smiles. “Pay will be the same as an apprentice.”  
  * Kibe shudders as he turns back towards Huneo.

# **Chapter 5 \- Home sweet home, kinda.**

* ## Harry 8-B Fighting with wildlife. Bagarisas participates as well.

  * Fight happens. Harry with Bagarisas seems to be getting the rhythm of each other better. Two Bagarisas die during the fight, then the other revives it.  
  * Harry uses the exploding forward power of Bagarisa.  
  * A bagarisa heals Harry. Harry cuddles with it. “Thank you\! I love you guys\!”  
  * Happy oinks.  
  * Harry then grows unhappy because he was still stuck in the forest.

* ## Harry 8-B stumbles by an abandoned shack.. 

  * Near Sundown. Bagarisa finds the remains of someone not far from the shack. Bagarisas chew on it. Harry realizes it was someone.  
  * Harry tells the bagarisa to stop. He looks at the clothes, older woman. He looks at the inside. Asks if there is anybody, but nobody replies.

* ## Harry 8-B Inside the Shack with the bagarisas.

  * Inside Harry uses the fost stone, the Bagarisas all flee to the outside.  
  * Harry tries to play with them, but they are all spooked.  
  * Harry checks the books, checks stuff, but things are kinda deteriorated. Harry looks for a map, but the only one he finds does not tell where he is.  
  * Harry sighs.  
  * Harry sees a fishing rod.   
  * Harry goes to sleep.

# **Chapter 6 \- Contract Nullification**

* ## Eori is in the room by herself, trying to free herself.

  * Morika comes into the room. Eori is aggressive when he tries to feed her, and results in violence.  
  * He knocks her out, then talks more about how to deal with her. They really can’t, so they drop Black Honey down her throat.

* ## Eori, Neferteri & Morika. Neferteri is seated right across Eori with the adventurers standing by her. Another seat by Neferteri is empty.

  * ![][image2]  
  * Eori is staring at Neferteri. She has some of the same look as Yacamim/Maiara “So what now?”  
  * Neferteri. “Princess—daughter Eori. My daughter Eori. When I stated that Harry was going to be under your care, I meant as in using him as a tool to further our scientific knowledge, and our kingdom into the future.”  
  * Eori, “I gave you a fuck load of new Nari gel? What about it?”  
  * Neferteri. “Speaking through the contract alone, you are delivering double the minimum required, but this is no longer about the contract between us, this is about your relationship with Harry.”  
  * Eori stands up and shouts “I NEVER SAID I LOVED HIM\!”  
  * The guards step forward, protecting the queen.  
  * Eori curls up her fists and seats back, holding back a sea of emotions.  
  * Neferteri raises her hand. The guards step back. Neferteri lets the awkward silence envelop the room in a thick atmosphere. “I am the queen of Sanbi Kingdom, but most of all I am the mother of four princesses. I trusted you with an important task despite my reservations regarding your ability to care for others. However, your inability to control your emotions turned out just as unacceptable as Maiara.”  
  * Eori stares deep at her mother, her mother stares back just as intensely.   
  * Their clash of resolve is broken, when Neferteri closes her eyes. “Princess Nina, please come in.”

* ## Nina holds a contract, about to say stuff to Eori with Neferteri’s assistance.

  * *// Image:* Nina comes into the room holding a contract. She smiles from ear to ear as she climbs up a chair and stands tall, and with a pumped chest, she unrolls the contract and attempts to imitate a guard declaring a punishment sentence.   
  * “With the afore—mentioned clause—sules. Queen Neferteri shall terminate the contract, and research funding.” Nina with a pumped chest, she unrolls the contract and attempts to imitate a guard declaring a punishment sentence.   
  * Neferteri calmly applauds Nina’s effort. “Thank you princess Nina. Based on y—”  
  * Eori feels the end of the line approaching. Tears begin pouring out of her eyes. Her cries evolve to a child caught stealing candy.  
  * Neferteri stood up, and hugged her crying daughter. “As queen of Sanbi Kingdom, I hereby relieve you of your research duties.” Tears flowed from Neferteri as a flashback to a dead fetus creeped back into her memory. “I’m sorry Eori. I should have known.”  
  * Eori’s scrappy voice follows up “Harry? I love him. I want him\!”  
  * Neferteri. “The search quest has been created..”  
  * Eori. “Thank you. Mom. What will happen to the contracts I signed?”  
  * Neferteri “I will deal with them. Nina, Shall we all apply the disguises, and return to the castle?  
  * “Yeahhh\!\!” A crying Nina joins the fray with a group hug.

# **Epilogue**

* ## Neferteri with Morika, Namia & Posaqui.

  * Neferteri. “Are we in the clear?”  
  * Namia “I don’t hear anyone. Go ahead my queen.”  
  * Neferteri “Morika, have you accomplished your goals?”  
  * Morika “Yes my queen. I finished burying Gabiro’s research.”  
  * Neferteri, “Namia & Posaqui. Was it successful?”  
  * Posaqui “Yessu\! I was able to lay a total of thirty five misdirections for the adventurers.”  
  * Namia “Three adventurers stumbled upon where Sinoi was captured, but they did find any new information.”  
  * Neferteri “I appreciate all of your resolve in aiding me in this matter. From now onwards, we will let the quest grow stale, and allow time to heal my daughter’s heart.”  
  * Morika “My queen, may we ask what our next instructions are?”  
  * Neferteri “Finding Harry & Sinoi. For that matter, I want you three to fully return to your adventurer role, and cast a wide net through the kingdom.” Neferteri hands out a badge from her bag. “However, I am afraid we only have a single badge, and it is for Harry. Furthermore, I will cut my stipend by half. I apologize for the lack of resources, but the new Courtroom scientist is restless on probing Eiri for expenditure information.”  
  * Morika “We shall do our best.“  
  * Neferteri. “Furthermore, I also want you three to investigate Arukia’s disappearance. The more I ponder on the subject, the more intertwined her actions seem to be. However, put your own safety above hers, for we do not know what her, or whoever controlling her, are.”  
  * Namia “I’m terribly sorry my queen. I had high confidence in my findings when I first observed Arukia.”  
  * Neferteri. “I don’t doubt your expertise, Namia. Arukia was simply too clever in disguising who she truly was.”

# 

# **\--Book 6 \- Sabbatical--**

# **Prologue**

* ## Hiromi & Yacamim in a small bar in the road between Forway & Sanbi

  * They talk about their adventures and exploits, and such. Hiromi cheers when a kinda drunk female adventurer just sits by Hiromi and starts talking “Hey\! You two\! Wanna buy me a beer in exchange for awesome gossip\!”  
  * Yacamim “How about my foot on your ass? Huh?”  
  * Hiromi hugs the guy and clashes beers “Shhhhh lady\! Let the guy peddle his stuff. Alright bud, what kind of gossip are we talking about?”  
  * Like a certain missing person that a certain someone is paying ten sapphires.  
  * Hiromi makes a circular finger motion to the bartender. The bartender gives a thumbs up. “Lemme guess—a rich merchant’s kid was abducted by Blue Wozens again?”  
  * The female adventurer “Not even close, you giant feller\! Sanbi Royal posted a quest a few days ago calling all adventurers to find a guy called Harry. I think Eori is on heat or something like that over him too.”  
  * The bartender slaps three full beers at the table. Yacamim has an air of doubt to her, but she ignores it as she drowns herself in a large beer.  
  * Hiromi looks at Yacamim. “When did your sister become that frisky?”  
  * A spit takes blows over the table. Yacamim, suffocates herself, bringing the patrons of this roadside bar to her attention for just a bit. “You fucking cunt. Why would you put it like that?”  
  * Hiromi laughs it off “My bad, I guess, but I only remember her being innocent. I guess I haven’t really talked to her in years at this point.”  
  * Yacamim “If you laid back on the booze everytime we entered the castle, you would probably remember something you fat cunt.”  
  * Hiromi gets serious, “You be drinking too, cut the crap.”  
  * Yacamim “Fuck you\! You’re the one emptying our home stockpile.”  
  * Hiromi\! “Fuck that\! Fuck you\!” he stands up, and pumps his arm, as if calling her for a thrown down.  
  * Yacamim sits down in her beer mug so violently, that it dings both the mug, and the table.  
  * “Hey you two\! Gonna pay for that or you want someone to teach you a lesson?” A large man, not dissimilar from Hiromi himself, but much older, comes from the corner.  
  * They approach each other with firsts ready quenching for blood, but at the last second they do the Darfaries greeting.  
  * Hiromi “Damm brohta\! Haven’t seen you since retired\!”  
  * “Still living the life? I’m good with adventure. Found whatI wanted.”  
  * “For fucking real? You actually found the juiciest pussy of the four kingdoms? Damm, brotha. Proud of ya\!”  
  * They clash the hands, while further exchanging stories. Meanwhile, a sexually deflated Yacamin rolls her eyes, puts her hand on her pocket and throws a few amethyst in the table as she leaves.

# **Chapter 1 \- Black Magina**

* ## Sisters with Black Magina guy.

  * Katsumi refuses to spill out the beans. She spits at the guy's face. The guy slaps her back.  
  * Katsuki looks away from her Katsumi. She spills the beans.  
  * Black Magina guy “I like her. Send her to my quarters.”  
  * Katsumi spits on her. “We’re done.”

* ## Sisters forced into labor in a Magina field.

  * Katsumi picks up magina. One after the other then dumps in the bag with strength.  
  * Someone in the back slaps her for not taking care of the product.  
  * She shoves the bag against the guy and goes for a surprise attack. She wails dirt on him, then pushes him aside before fleeing. She runs towards the end of the field, a forest at the border inviting her freedom away, when suddenly an arrow pierces through her knees, bringing her down to the ground. She screams in agony as her tore up knee bleeds out. With her last breaths, she crawls towards the end when her body gives out.  
  * ![][image3]

* ## Katsuki looking at her sister from the metal frame window as she is being fucked by the Black magina field boss. 

  * ![][image4]  
  * Maybe add a Wozen Nari Gel mix to her? Make it cute, but signify that the Magina guy is into weird kinks.  
  * Katsuki’s eyes as she sees her sister running, then suddenly falling down. She closes her eyes as she feels the breaths of booze and sloopy penetration of the so-called magina boss.  
  * She tries to ignore it as she imagines what life would be like if Red Winga hadn’t captured them. Blank. She tries even harder to imagine, but nothing seems to come. Aside a sudden warm, and tingle sensation from the magina boss coming inside her. She feels it all, but chooses to not really feel it. Her mind comes and goes with memories of her life so far, and it has been nothing but pleasing to others.  
  * Magina boss pulls out, he slaps her ass before heading out.  
  * The Katsuki just stands there, waiting for something. Anything to happen.

* ## Katsumi trying to find a way to flee

  * She seems successful. But she learned a whole lot from fleeing.  
  * “Boss doesn’t need to know about the fun times we're having.”

# **Chapter 2 \- Aversion**

* ## Dream. A Bagarisa man fights two Adventurers, he injures one, but the other kills him.

  * FROM BEFORE PROLOGUE BOOK 1\. See Webtoon.

* ## Harry wakes up sweating, Bagarisas sleeping all over him, Fost stone lamp is dead.

  * Harry can’t seem to move. One of the Bagarisas farts. Harry shakes himself loose, and stands up. That’s when he realizes that the fost stone lamp turned off overnight.  
  * He steps out early in the morning. The bagarisas are around him. He feels a laziness taking over. As crude as it feels, this place is growing on him like a home would.  
  * Harry “Let’s explore to the north today”

* ## Harry notices a village in the distance. He and the bagarisas are looking from a ways.

  * Harry hears the village, he hears children playing, people going on with their lives. Harry stays still, He wants to go, but at the same time he doesn’t. *What if Eori finds me? What if Red Winga finds me?*  
  * Harry steps away to hide back into the forest.

# **Chapter 3 \- With a bored heart.**

* ## Eori & Maiara, with drinks, playing the Gwent-like game at the Sanbi Castle parlour.

  * They play the final round, and Maiara wins.  
  * Eori throws what she had on hand on the table, and gulps down what she had on hand. She slaps the empty cup at the table. “How can you live like this? This is too boring\!”  
  * Maiara throws what she had on the table. She stands up “Are you calling me lazy? Say that to my face again if you fucking dare\!”  
  * Eori stands up. She feels a rage to finally say what she wanted for many years. “You’re a lazy bitch\!”  
  * Maiara gets taken back for a second, then grabs Eori by the collar bone, Eori grabs her by her hair.  
  * Aurora clears her throat “Princesses?”  
  * The princesses let go of one another, and sat down in unison as a blanket of emotions covered in shame swept them both. They look away from each other while Aurora approaches them by the middle. “Princess Eori, you were so busy working on Nari Gels that you never realized Maiara’s accomplishments on eggfly. She is the glue that holds the Sanbi Kingdom team together”  
  * Blushy cheeks rose on Maiara. She glanced at Eori. “I’m not lazy\!”  
  * Aurora. “And everyone knows of your accomplishments as well, princess Eori. I can tell you are simply burned out from your research. Give it some time, maybe travel a bit to regain your mojo\!”  
  * Aurora puts her hands on the broader shoulder of Maiara. “Maybe cheer Priness Maiara’s tournament on XX?”  
  * Maiara glances at Eori every once in a while as an attention-seeking smile develops.  
  * Eori has a slight smile.

* ## Eori & Maiara with Aurora.

  * Eori shuts down. “I need to find Harry first.”  
  * Maiara gets pissed off “All right. That’s it\! He was supposed to be my husband\!”  
  * Eori “He’s not\!”  
  * Maiara stands up again, and puts both hands on the table “Yeah? Then why are you so obsessed with him?”  
  * Eori stands up as well, and faces her sister with passion in her eyes. “I AM NOT\! HE’S A NO—I WANT HIM AS A RESEARCH ASSISTANT\!”  
  * Aurora slowly backs away without saying anything.  
  * Maiara looks at Aurora “OH NO\! You come back here\!”  
  * Aurora “I’m sorry Princess, but I’m not sure what to say in this matter.”  
  * Maiara “What? It’s dead simple\! I asked for Harry\! He’s mine\!”  
  * Aurora “Asked?”  
  * Eori ignored Aurora. “No\! He’s mine\! You won the battle which means you lost Harry\!”  
  * Aurora “Princesses\!”  
  * Maiara continued to ignore Aurora “But that does not mean he is yours\!”  
  * Aurora affirms her voice “Princesses\! Please\!”  
  * Both princesses stare at Aurora with a penetrating gaze. Aurora feels like she is going to crumble at any moment. “Princess Maiara, how did you ask for Harry?”  
  * The princesses glanced at each other as if they suddenly realized something about the question at hand. Eori crossed her arms. “Maiara asked for a husband that could match her in combat, and Gabiro found someone from the outskirts that apparently had great innate power.”  
  * Aurora “So who did he sign a contract with?”  
  * The princess replied in unison. “The Queen”  
  * Aurora “Can’t you ask her to decide, then?”  
  * The princess shares glances, then avoids each other’s gaze. Maiara stood up, and left without saying a word.  
  * Aurora has a smile on her. *Princess Lover’s Quarrel with a Slum boy? I need to tell the girls right now\!*

* ## Sora & Eiri walk outside with guards. They are looking at Eori screaming from the top of her lunges

  * “HAAARRRRYYY\!\!\!\! II LLLLOOOOOVVEEE YOOOUU\!” A scream echoed in the bustling city night. The normal bustling noise suddenly calmed down as everyone tried to figure out what just happened.  
  * Eiri starts laughing as she stops to look towards the Sanbi castle towers. “Did Eori just say that she loved Harry?”  
  * Sora “That was her without a doubt.”  
  * “Hmmm—I guess good that she broke out of her shell, but where did that come from?”  
  * Sora. “Love at first-sight?”  
  * EIRI SUSPECTED THERE IS SOMETHING FISHY HAPPENING HERE. SHE   
  * Eiri “I guess that’s a thing. Maybe all those girly novels rotted her brain.”  
  * Sora’s puffed expression tells Eiri something. “Okay\! I know you like them too, but you are not screaming out someone’s name out of the window\!—yet\!”  
  * Sora turns her head away.  
  * Eiri laughs as she pets Sora’s head. *I guess love does make people do all kinds of crazy shit—* Eiri stops on her tracks. She was reminded of how pushy Neferteri was to get Harry to sign the contract, and how much money she placed on the search quest. *Did the Queen already know Eori loved Harry? But then why—*“Oh Crap\! Harry & Eori were having a love affair all this time\!”  
  * A loud gasp came out of Sora. “Then how did she have time to create all those Nari gels when you are this lovey dovey?”  
  * Eiri “It’s all about love—of which you lost your chance as he is not coming back for a maid.”  
  * Sora reddens in shame.  
  * “Still rubs you the wrong way? Then ask him to rub you the right way.” Eiri laughs, but that laugh ends with a sad smile. One of which appears when she is reminded of coercing Harry to sign the contract in the first place. *I’m sorry Harry. I hope you decided to flee it all instead…*  
  * Eiri tells the guard to scort Sora back to the dormitory. Eiri has a few things to talk about with Eori.

* ## Eori, by herself in her castle tower, looked out at the buzzling Sanbi life.

  * She imagines all the fun she had with Harry. She craves his smell, for his touch, and his obedience. She wants to go back to the house, but now she can’t because Neferteri terminated her contract.  
  * A knock on the door disturbs her flashbacks. She glances back, and sees Eiri. “Hey, gotta time to spare?”  
  * “I’m busy.” Eori looks back at the city life.  
  * Eiri. “All right. All right. I came here to ask about Harry.”  
  * Eori turns around. “What do you want?”  
  * Eiri. “So what was your relationship with him? Did you break up with him or what?”  
  * Eori feels the urge to explode, and smash Eiri’s face after Arukia’s face appears in her mind. Eori turns back towards the window. “Get out.”  
  * Eiri. “You know, if you need—”  
  * Eori. “GET OUT—NOW\!” She throws a pillow towards Eiri.  
  * Eiri takes a step back. She hangs her head and walks out.  
  * Eori starts crying tears of pure anger. Her anger keeps climbing to the point that she begins fisting the bed with all her might. One after the other, she sees her tormentor’s face, and how tender and sweet it would be to take its life away.

# **Chapter 4 \- Something fishy, and it ain’t the docks**

* ## Maids in Sora dormitory rooms. Everything is clean and girly.

  * Arukia “Did Eori really say that? That’s so sweet\!”  
  * Sora shakes her head. “There’s something wrong\! I know it\!”  
  * Itanema “You guys only noticed now?”  
  * Everyone stops.  
  * Sora. “Why didn't you say anything?”  
  * Itanema. “‘Cause It wouldn’t really change anything—just connect the dots. It’s that easy.”  
  * Sora & Aurora are trying to visualize the dots, and trying to connect them, but they seem unable to.  
  * Itanema puts her hand in her mouth. “The walls are saying that there is a love triangle between Arukia, Eori & Harry, and Harry dumped both of them, and disappeared with someone else.”   
  * Aurora gasps, and let’s her tea fall on the floor, while Sora is stuck in sheer unbelievability. Their mind now clicks for how long these people were out of the castle, or public eye for that matter.  
  * Itanema. “See? I told ya it was just a matter of connecting the dots. Now, Sora, can you put some sense on Eiri, and stop with her Big Momma behavior?”  
  * Sora is still finding it hard to swallow, “Then why Arukia never contacted us?”  
  * Itanema “Why would she? I would find it weird if she was suddenly not private with her life.”  
  * Sora still feels unsure.  
  * Itanema seemingly asks a sudden question, but with a decent amount of backstory. “Sora, Don’t you want to go home with your parents?”  
  * Sora shies away. She hugs her pillow.  
  * Itanema “Fleeing from it all again… It's not working, is it?”  
  * Aurora sits by Sora, and rests her head on her breasts. “C’mon Itanema, leave her alone. Sora, no rush.”  
  * Itanema. “No rush? Are we planning to live like cooking & accounting school the rest of our lives?”  
  * Aurora. “It’s not so bad. I do feel pretty safe.”  
  * Itanema disagrees, but does not say anything.  
  * A knock on the door disturbs the peace.

* ## Eiri visits the maids in the dormitory.

  * Eiri “Are you guys abusing Sora?” Eiri comes into the room, and closes the door behind her.  
  * Itanema “C’mon now. This is your chance.”  
  * Sora shakes her head on the pillow.  
  * Eiri. “What’s this all about?”  
  * Itanema “argh. I guess I will have to be the villain then—I don’t want this anymore. You’re—”  
  * Eiri widens her eyes. She goes on the defensive. “But this is for the better\! We lost Arukia”  
  * Itanema looks at Aurora, and Sora. Sora, noticing the awkward silence, raises her teary eyes out of the pillow and looks at Eiri, then goes back to hiding.  
  * Eiri “I thought you always told me everything\! Sora\! I don’t want to hurt you\! Neither you two\! Why did nobody say anything?”  
  * The maid's eyes seemed to tail off. Itanema “Because you only believe Sora anyways.”  
  * Eiri’s eyes moistened. “Everyone is hiding secrets from me\! This is not fair\! FINE\! Do what you guys want\! I’m going back to the castle.”  
  * The maids did not know how to respond. Sora looked at Eiri leaving, she hugged her pillow even more tight.  
  * The pillow flew to the right, and Sora hugged Eiri from the back.  
  * Eiri stood there, silent, or rather, unsure what to say.  
  * Sora. “I’m sorry\!”  
  * Eiri smiled a bit, then contained her smile. “If you are so sorry, then you will come live with me.”  
  * The maids in the back began laughing. Sora felt relieved, but apprehensive. “Yes, Big Momma.”  
  * Eiri. “Good. You guys are free to go back home in the morning” Eiri turned around “But\! The guards will still accompany you for a bit while I figure out this fishy smell.”  
  * Sora “Itanema already did.”  
  * Eiri. “Really? I’m all ears then.”

* ## Eiri, widened eyes, having listened to all the maids. Sora is sleeping against Aurora. Itanema sitting. Eiri, thinking strangely.

  * Eiri. “I just can’t believe it. I want to believe it, but I don’t. Hmmmm. It also makes sense as to why Neferteri was so willingly to call a search quest for Harry, and to even ask me to get him to sign the contract in the first place. She loves Eori the most after all.”  
  * EIEI SPILLS THE BEANS ON ALL THAT SHE KNOWS.  
  * Itanema. “That contract was not for Maiara, but for Eori?”  
  * Eiri. “Wasn’t she always on those excursion trips—oh SHE WAS NOT\! She was fucking Harry in the down low\! Wow\! It all makes sense now\!”  
  * Itanema. “See? I told ya all. Remember how frisky Arukia was with Harry?”  
  * Aurora laughed, “The poor guy had just resuscitated, and she was already up in his business.”  
  * Eiri. “Actually, this would even explain why Neferteri demanded that all Harry letters be directed through her as well. I really want to tell Itagiba, but if I do so it might just crumble the entire guild.”  
  * Eiri stood up. “Girls. This conversation dies here, with us. Do not tell anyone else, or we will be in a world of trouble.”

* ## Eiri stood in front of the house, with all the maids packed, ready to return to their houses at the break of dawn.

  * Eiri “Remember what I told you all yesterday.”  
  * The maids, in near unison, spoke. “Yes.”  
  * Eiri called in Sora. Sora clumsy, and girly made her way to her. Eiri wrapped Sora in front of her. “No more secrets, okay?”  
  * The maids, in near unison, spoke. “Yes.”  
  * “See you all at X for making brunch.”  
  * The maids split ways, Eiri hugs Sora. “Let’s go home, and take a shower?”  
  * Sora felt a tingle through her body. She blushed red.  
  * Eiri. “No wonder you can’t find a boyfriend. When Harry is found, you really  should wash his back.”  
  * Sora thinks of it, and gets even redder. She starts to walk past Eiri, getting ready to flee.  
  * Eiri grabs her. “Ahh-ahh. You’re not fleeing anymore ‘cause you’re mine to play with.”

# **Chapter 5 \- Life is Mutable.**

* ## Harry 8-C fishing in the river.

  * Harry starts to think that this new life is not so bad. He’s free to do anything, nobody hurts him.  
  * Something bites, but Harry does not hook the fish in. He pulled in the fishing line, and the bait was stolen. He slaps a new chunk of meat, and swings the line as hard as he can.  
  * He has memories of Katsumi & Katsuki. Of Eori, and everyone else.  
  * Something bites, Harry sets the hook in, and pulls a fish. The Bagarisas are all oinking. Harry cooks the fish on his hands, then pulls it apart, and throws it for all the Bagarisas. They go crazy slopping it up.  
  * Harry looks at the distance. He sees someone coming in a boat pulled by Egua.  
  * Harry retreats into the forest with the Bagarisas.

* ## Harry 8-C, with fishing rod, but no fish, walking back with the Bagarisas. Harry looks at the sun with his hands up,

  * “Hmmm\! I guess I will arrive by early night.”   
  * Harry walks with the Bagarisas. One of them oinked while bogging their head up/down a certain tree.  
  * Harry: “Oh\! You guys want some of that? Sure\!” Harry uses his power to bring down the fruits. The bagarisas goes to town, while Harry picks it up as well. He opens the shell, and eats. He reminds himself when he has just fled from the wagon, and ate a fruit that made him puke his guts out. Harry laughs. *Yeah. That sucked.*

* ## Harry 8-C fighting with a larger wildlife near sundown.

  * Fight occurs. Harry acts as the tank, and the bagarisas deliver a side attack. Harry delivers the final blow.  
  * Harry falls on the ground. Breathing deeply. “Oh wow. That was hard.”  
  * Harry pulls out a rusted knife and proceeds to chop up the animal. He slaps a piece of meat, with skin facing down on the Bagarisas, then grabs a large piece, and brings with him as well.

* ## Harry 8-C, finished having dinner late night, with Bagarisas, they all have full bellies. Enjoying the campfire.

  * Harry, laying on the ground, looked at the stars as the fire pushed away the cold chill of the forest.  
  * The Bagarisas stand up, and all look towards a certain direction. Harry does the same during the sunset  
  * The bagarisas squeal in danger. Suddenly an arrow pierced into Harry's flesh. He jumps back into the house, and hugs the wall as he feels his flesh burning from the arrow within. A crippling sansation spreads through his injury and his body with each heartbeat.  
  * Death Squeals come from the outside. Harry pictured the Bagarisas dying.   
  * Harry Grabs the arrow, and begins to pull it out with all his strength. More squeals in the distance infiltrate Harry's mind.   
  * Harry pulls the arrows with a single swing. Blood splatters all over. He coughs up the blood that filled his lungs, and spits it up as he stands up.  
  * Rage overtakes Harry as he screams from deep within his guts.

* ## Harry 9-A seeing a gastly human figure in the far out. POV Scene\!

  * ![][image5]  
  * Maybe a broken mirror on the side hinting the reader the flame on Harry’s head.  
  * His vision is desaturated, the colors are flat, but it feels, and sees a weavering gastly flame in the oppressing shape of a human in the far forest.  
  * Without a thought to his head, other than the raw, obscenely loud urge to kill.   
  * With each step, he feels its hands tickling as a massive fire builds up from the arm and up.  
  * The ghastly white ghost takes off running. It feels thrilling\! He pursues the target with all the strength he has, until he coks his both arms back and then forward, unleashing a torrent flame that lights up the sky.  
  * His ankles give in and he falls on all four. He looks forward, where there is a faintly white figure that is weavering like the flicker of a dying light.  
  * Suddenly, a piercing jab plows through his stomach. He turns around and sees a gathly white figure smirking behind him. With his right hand flat, he forced it through that shite smile, and deep into its mouth. He felt a spongy, warm thing, calling to him to be grabbed and pulled, so he did. The smile in the white ghost disappeared, leaving behind a pure agony.  
  * Stab\! Stab\! Stab\! He felt the desperation of white ghost as it repeatedly pierced him in the back.  
  * An ear piercing scream came out of him. His hand flares up in flame as he hears a sizzling sound come out of the ghost. He no longer has enough fire on him, but he does not let go of that spongy thing as the fire in his hands begins to wane.  
  * He tries, and tries to pump out more fire, but his hand is already losing his grip.  
  * He falls forward. He breathes deeply, but with each breath he only gets more out of breath. His limp body falls to the side.  
  * Another ghastly figure comes into play, carrying a two-handed weapon. It carefully observes him, he barely lifts his heavy hand. He wants to kill this figure, but he simply can’t.  
  * He wimps in agony as he lays there, with each breath closer to death. 

# **Epilogue**

* ## Itanema & Neferteri talking

  * Itanema “I did just like I told you.”  
  * Neferteri. “And did Eiri’s behavior match my expectations?”  
  * Itanema “It did. Now where’s Sinoi? He hasn’t contacted me in weeks\!”  
  * Neferteri hands her a map containing quite a few X marks around Sanbi, Curoland, Sundeath & Freeish. “Sinoi was helping Harry move around, while closely watching his movements. He disappeared at the same time as Harry.”  
  * Itanema grows angry “Why didn't you tell me?”  
  * Neferteri. “I still do not know who, or why, would do such a thing against Harry & Sinoi. I wanted to have a conversation with you, but with at least something tangible to inform, but I am afraid I haven;t found anything of value yet.”  
  * Itanema “Then issue a search quest\!”  
  * Neferteri “And place his only possible excuse in jeopardy?”  
  * Itanema “What do you mean by that?”  
  * Neferteri. “If I do not invoke the clausules of our contract, then Sinoi has a chance of convincing whoever captured him that he has no affiliation to us.”  
  * Itanema looks disappointed. She excuses herself.  
  * Neferteri. “Furthermore, I foresee Aurora leaking the secret. If that were to come true, I want you to talk to Eori, and pressure her to publicly punish Aurora.”  
  * Itanema. “As you wish, my queen.”  
  * Itanema leaves. Neferteri. *This should further stabilize the situation.* Neferteri closes her eyes. *Princess Eori. Daughter. Why must you keep acting that way? How should I proceed? How can I speed up the healing?*

# 

# **\--Book 7 \- Friends in Low Places—**

TODO: HAVE SOMEONE IN THE WOZEN PARTY THAT BOUNDS WITH HARRY OVER SOME OF THE STUFF HE STILL REMEMBERS LIKE HOURS BEING 24 HOURS ETC. Something to bond over.

# **Prologue**

* ## Kibe finds Gabiro’s journal in a pile to the side. Huneo, sitting and working.

  * Kibe “You’re still finding his journals?”  
  * Huneo stops what he was working on. “Captain guards raided a personal stash of his stored at Forway scientific school.”  
  * // Talk about the teacher's name.  
  * Kibe stops and opens the book to glance through. Gabiro’s enigmatic scribbles cover everything. “So did you crack any of his code?”  
  * Huneo “Of course not, otherwise we would have made all his research public for the benefit of the kingdom.”  
  * Kibe. “I thought so. Good luck with that.”  
  * Kibe piles the book back, and walks away.  
  * Huneo. “Apprentice Kibe.”  
  * Kibe “What?”  
  * Huneo. “My guards were investigating what happened on {DAY}, and we crossed through an additional factoid that everyone glanced over: Nobody in the slums knows about Harry.”  
  * Kibe “I don’t know either. I lost all memories of that day, and several weeks prior.”  
  * Huneo. “I figured as much.That’s unfortunate. Thank you for your time, now proceed ahead with the tasks I was given.”  
  * Kibe walks out of the room. 

# **Chapter 1 \- Sanbi’s Four Power Players XX, XX 1040 meeting.**

* ## Huneo & Kibe meeting with Neferteri, Itagiba, Eiri.

  * Jovial guy wants an increased allowance to hunt down all Gabiro secret researches as they are all kingdom property. It’s people's money\!  
  * Eiri “Gabiro would go on field researches, or execute research partnerships”  
  * Huneo. “I have enough evidence to confidently say he was using the kingdom's money on private research.”  
  * Neferteri closes her eyes, thinking. “Might we know of such evidence?”  
  * Huneo. “I gave it off to the captains to look into. Suffice to say, I believe some of those field researches were in fact used to hide away somewhere.”  
  * Neferteri nods. “If your assumption is true, then that would be a grave mistake from him.”  
  * Eiri. “On the budget side of things, how much are you asking for?”  
  * Huneo “20 Sapphires upfront, 5 sapphires additionally per week.”  
  * Eiri “Per week? Or weekly gains are around 2 right now\! I can do at most 5 weeks of that without putting a strain on our coffers.”  
  * Neferteri. “It is as Eiri eloquently put it. You could assign your own guards to hunt down Gabiro’s research.”  
  * Huneo fights back. “Those guards are protecting the city already, I need additional resources. I cannot spare ”   
  * Neferteri. “Otherwise I agree with a condition, Eori becomes an apprentice as well.”  
  * Huneo. “Tsk. The Sanbi laws do not prohibit the number of apprentices. Fine but she will need to obey my orders.”  
  * Neferteri raises her badge. “I will not stand between your way and hers. Dear?”  
  * Itagiba. “Well, she’s grumpy, but if you think that's the best long-term for her, then sure thing.” Itagiba raises his badge as well.  
  * Eiri “I think we should consult with her first.”  
  * Huneo lifts his badge.  
  * Neferteri “Three against one. It has been decided already. I will break the news to her.”  
  * Eiri “Next matter, then—Fanchaki. Gabiro's research into Fanchaki is not panning out exactly as he envisioned. The new fanchakis are juicier, and thicker, but they are now more willing to fight back, and they seem to have more Soul Energy too.”  
  * Itagiba. “Are we still profiting?”  
  * Eiri “Yes, but I forecast a break-even or loss if the amount of Nari gel stone keeps increasing.”  
  * Itagiba “Why?”  
  * Eiri. “Healing. The Fanchakis have been more aggressive. Like as if they realized they were being culled.”  
  * Itagiba. “Well, I can still spin that as a positive. I vote to just release them in the wild when we stop making money.”  
  * Huneo has some grievances, but three against one means he loses it.  
  * Eiri, “Next Topic, Harry.”

* ## Itagiba, Neferteri, Huneo & Eiri.

  * Eiri proposes increasing the quest reward, Huneo refuses. He drills them with questions about Harry, including why nobody can pinpoint his family, etc.  
  * Neferteri evades the questions to get Huneo out of her trail.  
  * Itagiba covers for Neferteri as well with the same marketing as he gave everyone else.  
  * Eiri wants to come out clean, but seeing Neferteri’s gaze she cowered in fear.  
  * Huneo buys the answers at the end, but he just does not accept increasing the reward for Harry. He demands budgeting control. Neferteri accepts to promote the idea that she is not tied so closely to Harry. Itagiba goes along, Eiri refuses, but she is outvoted.  
  * Eiri holds back her emotions, and continues to the next topic.

* ## Itagiba & Neferteri talking one-to-one

  * Itagiba. “Hey Nefi, is everything all right?”  
  * Neferteri stands up, and hugs her husband. “Of course it is. You are here with me.”  
  * Itagiba asks if they are doing the right thing with Eori. Neferteri says something along the lines of occupying her mind. She needs to forget Harry.  
  * Itagiba wonders if forcing her into a position is the best for her. Neferteri says she knows best, and she won't let the same emotional outbursts happen to Eori.  
  * Itagiba “Maiara learned her lesson, I still think Eori should live and learn. There is a reason we have Forway laws.”  
  * Neferteri. “Let me handle her. She will be a shining example.”  
  * Itagiba “All right. If you feel so strongly about it, then have your way. Just give them a slack once in a while.”

# **Chapter 2 \- An offer hard to swallow.**

* ## Harry, \#9B wakes up in a basement, tied, with a splash of cold water. Clodoveu & Wilson (holding his nose) have buckets of cold water ready to throw.

  ![][image6]

  * Harry wakes up from the cold water splashing him. Water droplets fall everywhere. Hardened blood and dirty murkies the water as they fall of him  
  * Clodoveu. “Hey there\! Sorry for the water, but we don't want you to set the basement ablaze.”  
  * Wilson. “Phew. Did you ever take a bath? My man, you stink like ass\! Like an ass left to rot in the sun.”  
  * Marcus “Shut up.” He approaches Harry, grabs him by the Hohawk and pulls it back. He points the knife in Harry’s throat, he slits. Harry gurgles in agony as the wound heals itself nearly instantly. Harry pants as he feels weak after he heals.  
  * Clodoveu. “Was that really necessary?”  
  * Marcus points the knife, ready to slit again. “That was for burning my tongue alive, you motherfucker—who the fuck are you?”  
  * Harry seems hesitant.  
  * Marcus stabs Harry on the shoulder. “I’m not fucking around\! Where is XXX?”  
  * Clodoveu taps Marcus in the shoulder. Marcus moves his shoulder away, pushing Clodoveu aside “Fuck off you fag. I am talking here.”  
  * Clodoveu raises his hands, then sits down.  
  * Marcus looks at Harry, he grips his hands on his Mohawk really tight, he can feel his skin ungluing from his cranium.  
  * “Harry.” Harry slowly let out a faint, painful voice.  
  * “From Where?” Marcus was short on his response.  
  * “Sanbi—Kingdom.” Harry gruels through his speech.  
  * Marcus lets go of Harry. “Sanbi my ass. You are a Hifuna beast.”  
  * Wilson “Waaaaaaattt\! For real?”  
  * Harry moves his head forward, it throbes in pain. “Haaaaaa?”  
  * Marcus points the knife at Harry’s face “Don’t ha me\! You're lying\! You two, figure this fucker out while I rotate the Bagarisas. I want to know where that old fat bitch went to” Marcus leaves.  
  * Harry pictures his friends, now being roasted alive. Fire surges from his hand, and engulfs to his elbow.  
  * Clodoveu almost misses Harry’s transformation, he splashes a bucket of cold water flames out the fire. Harry shakes violently, cold.

* ## Harry \#9B soaking wet, with the two bandits generating new cold water for the buckets.

  * Bandits generate cold water. Harry silently watches them.  
  * Clodoveu. “See Wilson? That’s why Marcus does not have any friends.”  
  * “For real, what an asshole—” Something clicked in Wilson’s mind. He looked to himself “Hey\! Don’t use my real name\! I’m not wearing fake skin\!”  
  * Harry shakes violently as he stares at the two.  
  * Clodoveu “It’s fine. By the way, Harry, I’m Clodoveu. Sorry about the Bagarisa, but Marcus is still pissed after what you did.”  
  * Harry clicked his teeth narrowly missing his tongue as he spoke, “What did I do? I was having dinner with the Bagarisas and someone attacked me\! I—” everything afterwards seems like it was darkness.  
  * Clodoveu. “So you don't remember, he? You burned Marcus’ tongue inside his own mouth. That was after nearly sending Wilson to the darkness.”  
  * Wilson laughs. “For real, I nearly shat myself.”  
  * Clodoveu. “No, you actually did shit yourself.”  
  * Wilson laughs more. “Ops.”  
  * Clodoveu. “So yeah. You’re not in a position to make requests, but if you spill out everything you know, I would let you join the team.”  
  * Wilson “You sure?”  
  * Clodoveu bobs his head. “So, Harry?”  
  * Harry pictures the Bagarisas. Their happy little smiles. “You fucking killed them\! I’m not joining you\!”  
  * Clodoveu. “That’s too bad. Then I have no choice other than make you meet the darkness.” Clodoveu grabs his weapon, he gets ready to swing while Wilson grabs a bucket of cold water.

* ## Clodoveu preparing to swing his weapon. Wilson with a bucket of cold water.Harry, with his eyes closed, preparing to die, just like how he did 

  * Harry imagines how he died at the hands of Maiara. The feeling, how everything felt hopeless.  
  * A hammer strikes the ground. Harry jumps.   
  * “You don’t look like someone who wants to die, but I can tell you already did.” Clodoveu puts his weapon aside, and sits down. “You want to know what a Hifuna beast is?”  
  * Harry looks at Clodoveu.  
  * Clodoveu starts ”If you ever go near Hifuna, you will see all kinds of strange beasts. Most of them are animals we eat, but turned into monsters as they spend their lives out there. A friend of mine went there to loot dead adventurers, and he never came back. But you—I don’t think you are a Hifuna beast—did you sell yourself to a scientist?”  
  * Harry grows curious. “Selling myself to a scientist? Is that what people do?”  
  * Clodoveu “I might be able to say so. Care to tell a story of how you got this Bagarisa power?”  
  * Harry looks restrained. He sees Eiri telling him to not say anything, while putting her pinky out. He looks angry. Harry nods back.  
  * Clodoveu opens a bag of snacks. A huge smirk appears on his face as he munches on the snack. “Right on. Tell me every single detail.”  
  * Wilson sits down as well, he goes to steal a snack from Clodoveu, when a solid look from him keeps Wilson at bay. Wilson retreats his hand, and looks at Harry. “This better be spicy\!”  
  * Harry felt like he was frozen, as he spoke everything he knew.

* ## Marcus handing out Bagarisa meat on a stick. He has a stick right in front of Harry. Harry is covered in a cloth to minimize the cold. His stomach grows. Wilson & Clodoveu are devouring the Bagarisa.

  * ![][image7]  
  * ![][image8]  
  * The tantalizing smell of the freshly cooked seasoned meat, wrapped around corn meal is making Harry’s stomach violently growl. However, the imagery of the Bagarisas, now all dead, make him feel ill at the same time. He turns his head.

* ## Harry \#10 looks at the moon as he is bundled in warm blankets. Clodoveu by his side inside the house. Clodoveu has the same Nari gel that Arukia used to see in the dark.

  * Harry “So what do you guys even do?”  
  * Clodoveu “The usual. Stealing, sometimes kidnapping, mostly against filthy rich people. That’s the Blue Wozens motto.”  
  * Harry “Blue Wozens?”  
  * Clodoveu shows his proof that he is part of Blue Wozens. “Boss formed this bandit group a while ago when some Forway rich families looked down upon his family. They took advantage of him through contracts, that is until he realized he has a way out.”  
  * Harry “A way out?”  
  * Clodoveu. “Flee from the contract, and leech off the rich that once imprisoned him.”

  * Clodoveu “A bitch and a half. That’s for—something in the distance. I can’t quite make it out—oh. It’s a Fatupiri. Nevermind. As long as it does not come too close.”

  * Clodoveu. “Life is all about eating or getting eaten. Eori ate you plenty of times, but did you ever eat her back?”  
  * Harry imagines eating her pussy. Harry laughs “I guess so?”  
  * Clodoveu smirks as well. “Lemme rephrase. Did you want to eat her? Do you love her?”  
  * Harry feels agony thinking about it. He feels a heart stab, but not from loneliness, but from fear of what she could do to him if she ever found out. “Hmmm hmm.”  
  * Clodoveu “There’s your answer. Somewhere in this world you will find the thing you want to eat the most. I already found mine, but he did not want to eat me back. Now I am looking for the second best thing.”  
  * Harry understands, but he then goes silent as he thinks of the Bagarisas.

  * Harry contains himself. He takes a deep breath.

# **Chapter 3 \- Sanbi’s Second Courtroom Scientist Apprentice**

* ## Neferteri, Itagiba, Eori & Huneo.

  * “I never agreed to something like that. ” Eori, laid-back in the chair with arms crossed, drew everyone's attention, and her mother’s disapproval look.  
  * Neferteri “This is no longer a matter of agreeing, but a matter of doing.”  
  * “THEN I DON’T WANNA IT\!” Eori stands up, and steps out.  
  * “Harry.” Itagiba says the word right about the door as it is about to close. He follows up with a smile. “You want to see him, right?”  
  * Eori remains stopped at the door. She hides her face.  
  * Neferteri lays her hand on her husband's strong arms, then continues. “At this rate we will need to prune unnecessary expenses over the upcoming weeks, and Harry’s search quest is one of them.”  
  * “Why?” An aggressive tone, yet sad came out of Eori.  
  * “Simply due to the fact that we are implementing Huneo’s strategies to improve our kingdom.”  
  * Eori slams the door close, and turns around pointing at Neferteri, and Itagiba. “Harry is your fault\! FIX IT\!—”  
  * Neferteri widens her eyes. Eori seemed to be about to say something she feared she would say.   
  * Huneo stands up in between. “THIS IS NOT HOW YOU TREAT THE QUEEN\!”  
  * Neferteri closes her eyes. Itagiba stands up. “Huneo, it’s fine. We understand.”  
  * Huneo “Absolutely not\! This is not acceptable\! Eori\! As my second apprentice, I demand you to apologize RIGHT NOW\!”  
  * Eori trembles with anger, she lifts Huneo off the ground, and is moments away from doing a free teeth removal—  
  * “You are no better than them, princess Eori.” Neferteri opens her eyes, and a cold voice reaches Eori, triggering a flood of memories of her hot blood not being any different than the sisters.  
  * Itagiba, “Them? Ohhhh. That’s low.” but it goes unheard amongst the commotion.  
  * Eori pushes Huneo away, and stomps out of the room.  
  * Huneo organizes himself. “I shall report this violation—”  
  * Itagiba let out a sigh. “C’mon Huneo\! Give us a slack here\!”  
  * Huneo. “Absolutely not. I bid my King and queen a good day\!”  
  * The door closes. Itagiba looks at Neferteri. “He’s stealing my thunder, honey. I think you were right after all.”  
  * Neferteri. “I see this as an opportunity to incorporate some of those values to our guild.”  
  * Itagiba “And then be like your parents? That sucks.”  
  * Neferteri. “Everything in moderation, my dear. There’s a reason I am here, not there.”  
  * Itagiba smiles as he points at his beefy arms as he flexes them. “Is it because of these two bad boys?”  
  * Neferteri cracks a jovial smile. “There’s more than that. Now, shall we proceed with the day?”  
  * Itagiba “You betcha.”

* ## Eori in her room, breaking stuff up.

  * Eori throws her hand against something, breaks other stuff. She smashes stuff.  
  * Tears came pouring out of her eyes. She curls up by the bed, and begins crying. “I just wanted Harry\!”  
  * Someone knocks at the door.  
  * “Leave the fuck alone\!”  
  * Huneo comes into the room, with a sanbi guard beside him. Huneo looks around the room “You will have to pay for all this damage as well, Princess Eori.”  
  * Eori felt a rage inside her, she stood up and began to pace herself towards Huneo, but stopped. The guards had their arrows pointed at Eori’s head.  
  * “I received permission to do as I please to guarantee my safety.” Huneo smiles, almost taking pleasure in putting Eori in her place.  
  * Eori points out of the door. “Then get the fuck out\!”  
  * Huneo. “Seems like you did not hear the verdict. I will repeat it then. You are my second apprentice now, so this means you shall do my bidding. I want you to report to the castle lab right now for developing new Nari gels.”  
  * Eori. “I’M NOT YOUR BITCH\! FUCK OFF\!”  
  * Huneo. “Guards, arrest her for contempt.”  
  * Eori and the guards fight. Eori eventually loses.  
  * As Eori is pinned down into the ground, she sees Neferteri peeking through the hallway. “Fucking bitch. You will pay for this.”

* ## Eori is working for Huneo. Guards by the door. Huneo has a captain guard by him to protect him.

  * Huneo looked through the stockpile that Gabiro/Kibe left behind. He hands a paper to her. “First off, I want an updated inventory of everything here by XX.”  
  * Eori. “That’s impossible\!”  
  * Huneo. “This is an order. Make it happen.”  
  * Eori feels the rage inside her, she looks at the guard putting his hand over his sword, and forces herself to not explode.  
  * Huneo. “Good\! Now where are your experimental journals?”  
  * Eori. “It’s all in my head\! I don’t write it down for the likes of you to steal it\!”  
  * Huneo. “Then you will write it all down after doing an inventory.”  
  * Eori grabs a bottle and gets ready to throw, but as she is about to do it, an arrow pierces her forearm, shattering her bone  
  * Eori’s forearm falls forward, limping with the exposed bone. She screams in pain, agony & rage.  
  * Huneo grabs a Nari Refresher and lays on the table, close to Eori. “You’re the one doing that to yourself. Respect me, and I will respect you.”  
  * Eori stays silent, with bloodshot eyes as blood flass from her arm with each heartbeat.  
  * Huneo leaves. “You better heal yourself and clean up before you pass out and die. Guards, do not let her leave. I will tell Eiri to bring her dinner here.”

  * Harry nods.
