  * Marcus “Just tell us what to do, and fuck off.”  
  * She looks at Clodoveu, overseeing the map with Wilson nearby, having no idea what it all means.

* ## Map of the Hotspot with villages nearby. The goal is to attack Maicon’s warehouse.

  * ![][image10]  
  * Wozen lady. “Your team will invade Maicon’s warehouse in Forkpoint, then bring the looth through the boat to Old village. Your team will split up, with one side bringing the loot north to Fiera’s hut, and the other following the river to Minala. Then you change to a wagon, and pass through Rebula before burning the wagon.”  
  * Marcus “What about the invasion? How the fuck are we supposed to do that?”  
  * Wozen Lady “The surveyors noticed that there is always a handful of Magina, or Bagarisa Brothers protecting the place. Go quiet, and we won’t have any trouble.”  
  * Clodoveu looks at Harry. “Makes sense. Harry, you will become a Bagarisa, and throw a fit to grab attention. Marcus & Wilson will attack them, and fake their bodies while carrying empty boxes to Rebula, while me & Harry go North.”  
  * Wilson looks half-dead. “Whatever man, I just wanna die.”  
  * Marcus. “Maicon. Does he show up there?”  
  * Wozen lady. “A dead merchant does not make money. Kill him, and I will gut you alive.”  
  * Marcus “Tsk. Kill one, two more show up. Who fucking cares?”  
  * Wozen lady stands up, and slapped the table, almost breaking it. “I fucking care.”  
  * Marcus stands up, and faces her, ready to throw down.  
  * Clodoveu looks at Wozen lady “If you are trying to fuck him, then I’m sorry to tell you you’re not his type. He prefers a Tolerideme woman.”  
  * Wozen lady blushes. “Aww whatever. You got your plan, now get out\!” She leaves the team alone.  
  * Marcus stares seriously at Clodoveu “Is that what she fucking wanted?”  
  * Clodoveu “Oh\! Trust me. Totally.” He rolls up the plan. “All right homies. You know the plan, so let’s go to sleep, and leave in the morning.”  
  * Marcus “To some good motherfucking bloody money\!”  
  * They all raise their glasses, Harry follows them, but in his mind he feels unsure.  
  * Harry looks at Clodoveu. “Is she like me?”  
  * Clodoveu “XXX? Nah. She’s always wearing that Nari gel, and she can’t use Wozen’s interface, but she really wants to.”  
  * Harry “really?” Harry lit his hand on fire at will. “I wish I could use the Darfaries interface.”

# **Epilogue**

* ## Harry, outside with a Fost Stone lamp by his side as the sun rises, Wozen Lady hidden on the tree above.

  * ![][image11]  
  * Harry sees the sun rising above the trees in the forest, but his mind floats around all the people he betrayed. He broke Eiri’s promise, he let the Bagarisas die, now he’s about to steal from someone. Harry feels a squeeze in his heart. *Is this what I really want? But what can I even do? I don’t know anyone\!*  
  * Something falls right behind Harry, squeezes him tightly, and lifts him off the ground. The thing takes a deep breath of him, like a fat guy would of a fried chicken he just bought.  
  * Harry laughs from the tickles the breath from this thing does to his neck.   
  * “You’re just like Desmond\!” a familiar voice comes to his ear as it squeezes him. It’s brisky fur rubbing on Harry makes him laugh even harder.  
  * Harry’s feet touch the ground again, and he is freedHarry gains steps from this thing, then turns back.   
  * Wozen lady smiling at him. “Fost stone only keeps dumb animals at bay—aren’t you cold?”  
  * Harry looks at his half-naked self, “hmm. I guess not?”  
  * Wozen lady comes closer. “Clodoveu told me all about you. How did the Sanbi scientist make it happen?”  
  * Harry. “Who? Gabiro? Yeah. I never met the guy—Eiri was the old one who told me about him.”  
  * Wozen lady. “Did they give any details of what they did?”  
  * Harry shakes his head. “I also had no memories of anything, so they probably did not bother explaining.”  
  * Wozen lady approaches Harry’s ear, and whispers slowly. “If you find out how, I will let you do anything you want”  
  * Harry blushes.  
  * Wozen lady blushes as well “Not like that\! I meant like—like going to other teams\! Even working by my side\!”  
  * Harry laughs. She laughs as well, then puts her hands up, and belly forward. Harry knows that is, so he does that as well. As they touch bellies, and handsome, she says. “I promise it.”  
  * Harry smiles, and nods.

# 

# **\--Book 8 \- Small Problem--**

# **Prologue**

* ## Harry, Marcus, Clodoveu & Wilson on a wagon by themselves. Wilson picked his nose. Marcus observing around, while Clodoveu & Harry looked forward

  * Clodoveu “So yeah. We’ve been on our own for at least 5 to 7 years before we got poached by Blue Wozens.”  
  * Harry “So how did you guys meet?”  
  * Clodoveu explains their backstory. Wilson laughs. Marcus stands up and faces away from the carriage, and starts peeing off the road.  
  * Clodoveu keeps telling their backstory.  
  * Harry. “Freeish kingdom is to the south, right?”  
  * Clodoveu “You got it\! Actually, you've never been there either? Well, let’s go take a trip there once we get some balls from this plan. There’s this Taco thing that you gonna love\!”  
  * Harry looks pretty interested.  
  * Marcus “We’re close to Forkpoint”  
  * Clodoveu stops the wagon on the side of the road. “Let’s wear fake bodies. Harry, you ready?”  
  * Harry, “I guess so.”  
  * Clodoveu hands him a Nari gel bottle. It has Bagarisa fur, eyes, etc. Harry gulps.  
  * Marcus “I’m gonna force it down your throat if you don’t.”  
  * Clodoveu. “Give him some time. Some people aren’t good at swallowing.”  
  * Marcus narrows his eyes, but does not say anything.  
  * Harry takes a deep breath, and eats the jelly in gulps. His body begins to open a fissure as blood, and a white soul flame pours out. Harry screams in pain as his voice lowers, sounding more hoarse, bagarisa-like. Tusks grow out from his face, as one of his arms swallows.  
  * Marcus, grabbing his knifes “What the fuck?”  
  * Harry gives out a massive shriek, making the forest tremble in fear.  
  * Marcus throws a knife right on its forehead. It looks at Marcus with hangryness in its eyes.

# **Chapter 1 \- Side Effects**

* ## Harry \#11A, like a wild animal, staring at Marcus. Marcus ready to throw down. Clodoveu protects Wilson, who is scared shitless.

  * Marcus “I’m gonna fucking skin you alive, and eat you you fat piece of shit\!”  
  * Harry trucks towards Marcus, he tilts his head forward to strike, and squish Marcus like one would with strawberry in its hand.  
  * Marcus waits for the last second, then dances out of the way before slashing Harry’s arm open as it passes by.  
  * Clodoveu grabs his weapon, and steps forward. Marcus notices him. “Don’t you fucking dare\! He's mine\!”  
  * Clodoveu. “He will eat you. I’m warning you.” Clodoveu is applying Nari gel on himself. Wilson opened a Nari Gel and gulped the entire contents in one shot. Clodoveu “You’re gonna poison yourself with that much Quick Think”  
  * Wilson “I can do it\!”  
  * “Go suck a big fat ” Marcus, meanwhile, takes a Nari gel from his pocket, opens the lid, and dips another knife. He throws it at Harry’s as it prepares to charge again.  
  * Marcus steps back, gaining distance. He prepares another knife when he notices a fireball appear in between the tusks of Harry, and quickly speeds towards him.   
  * Marcus launched a knife towards, it met midway, and exploded in a curtain of fire.  
  * Marcus flipped Harry off. “Fuck—”  
  * Something large flew through the curtain of flame.

* ## Marcus with severed large Harry \#11 hand strikes on his face, throat, and chest as he flipped off Harry. Meanwhile, Harry’s 11 hand is healing up. Clodoveu’s arms are twice as big, and Wilson has quick thinking.

  * “I told ya.” Clodoveu grabs his weapon.  
  * Wilson hears, and sees everything in slow motion. “Cccccccoooooollllddd Wwwwwaaattteeeerrrrr.”  
  * Clodoveu looks at Wilson, his head motion is casting a spell three times as fast as normal. His muscle movements are so quick that is near the breaking limit, his tendons are healing up with each movement. “Then shock.”  
  * Clodoveu rushes towards Harry. Harry notices, and puts up a defense in an x formation. Clodoveu looks at his arms, forming an x, then at his lower body. Clodoveu stops midway, and let’s his two handed mace fly towards Harry’s gut.   
  * Harry’s large arm moves down, and catches the brunt of the impact. Flesh, bones, and soul fire flies everywhere.  
  * Harry let’s out a massive shriek and rushes towards Clodoveu with a fist in his smaller hand. Clodoveu stops it with his hand, noises of bone cracking echoes around. Clodoveu then punches Harry’s gut with his other, then steps back as he evades the large hand now nearly regenerated.  
  * Clodoveu shakes his hand. “Not even a dent.”  
  * Wilson splashes a torrent of Cold water on Harry. It’s flames go back in/out, then the shite soul flame covering his body grows stronger.  
  * Harry’s flame swallows up. It weaves before exploding in a curtain of fire.

* ## Everything is on fire. Clodoveu has his whole front body burned, his face has the shape of his arm that he used to protect. Wilson is running in the distance. Harry 11B

  * Clodoveu “Uffda. That was pretty good. Ohh? That took out some of your energy, huh? Wilson\! Cold Water\! Wilson\!” Clodoveu looked back, and saw Wilson fleeing for his life in the distance.  
  * “Haaaa You dickass. I’m gonna remember that\!” Clodoveu prepares his hand, and cracks his neck. “Well, I’m dead either way.”  
  * Clodoveu walks towards Harry, who seems cautious of what Clodoveu is doing. It prepared a fireball, and launched towards Clodoveu, he moved his belly aside and his arm up, the ball flew by his arm and belly, burning the skin, and falling to the ground in the distance, exploding, and searing Clodoveu’s back & Hair. They stopped healing. Clodoveu touched his hair. “I’m all out of healing now. Dammit. Well, you asked for it\!” Clodoveu flew at Harry, and started throwing one punch after the one, Harry defended a few, but he could not keep up with him.  
  * Harry was taking blows left, and right. Bones broke, flesh was torn, blood spilled out, but it was near instantly healed.  
  * Clodoveu’s timing began to slow, he was out of breath, he took a step back to take a breath. “Wooo\!” He said, looking up to Harry’s hand coming down with full force.  
  * Clodoveu’s body froze, then began to fall apart like a cut up ham. Harry screamed loudly, then began devouring the body like someone well versed in gorgin food in an all-you-can-eat buffet.

* ## Wilson ran through the forest, his mind racing, and eyes blood-shot, everything blurred.

  * Wilson’s body was nearly weightless as Wilson pushed his body to the maximum. Wilson’s mind was working fast, his racing thoughts analyzed nearly every single thing in his vision, and adjusted his pacing. He felt his bones cracking, his joints busting, and healing, only to be burst again.  
  * Everything was just fine, that is until his body began feeling light, his thoughts going even faster that he himself could not understand them. His vision blurred, and he toppled himself on something, falling into the forest ground.  
  * He was able to hobble his belly up, but his arms, and legs began to move uncontrollably, he tasted sweet, sour, then bitter. He heard Clodoveu, he heard Harry’s screams, he saw everything, he heard everything.  
  * His body was convulsing. His mouth clamped shut on his own tongue, with bloody foam forming around his mouth, and suffocating him.  
  * Gurgles of the body stopped as Wilson’s lungs filled up. He calmed down, and began to sleep soundly, somewhere within the forest.

# **Chapter 2 \- Sanbi Beast**

* ## Eori spying at Eiri’s door talking with Sora

  * Eori was going to talk to Neferteri, but he heard Eiri crying instead. She paid close attention.  
  * Sora “C’mon Eiri\! You gotta let go of him\! You’ve seen what became of the quest—”  
  * Eori feels this urge inside her. She opens the door. “WHAT BECAME OF IT?”  
  * Sora gets flustered and looks to the side, away in shame.  
  * Eiri looks at Eori. “Nobody has told you?”  
  * Eori “About what?”  
  * Eiri gives her a call sign to come in and close the door.  
  * Eori does so, but she does not take a seat. Instead she glares at Eiri & Sora as she stands by a few feet from them.  
  * Eiri “Adventurers are giving up on the quest as nobody can’t seem to find a hint of where Harry disappeared to.”  
  * Eori. “THEN RAISE THE AMOUNT\!”  
  * Eiri shakes her head. “I tried, but Huneo prevented it. In his eyes, this quest is already paying too much.”  
  * Eori points at the office next door, the king, and queen of Sanbi. “They also said no to increasing it?”  
  * Eiri slowly shakes her head up-down as a hum confirms Eori’s suspicion.  
  * Eori turns around, and starts to leave without saying a word. Her anger seems to make the gravity of the room increase.  
  * Eiri. “Wait\! Please keep this between us, okay?”  
  * Eori glances back, blood-thirty eyes, then leaves without saying a word.

* ## Eori, with Nari Gel, at Huneo’s office. 

  * Eori injects Nari on herself out of pure spite. Huneo, and the guard are caught off-guard..  
  * Eori launches an attack on the guard. He can barely defend himself, he tells Huneo to run. He doesn’t.  
  * Eori launches the guard away, incapacitating him.  
  * Huneo opens his arms. “C’mon\! Do it\! I know you want to kill me\! DO IT\!”  
  * Eori falls for the trap, and kills him and starts to laugh as she bashes his head on the ground.  
  * She feels someone watching. She turned around and realized there was a maid, floored seeing Eori acting like a wild animal.  
  * A realization comes into her of what she just did. Tears from her eyes. And explodes out of her eyes. Her voice cracks as the words Harry forms from within the unintelligible grumbs.

* ## Neferteri with Eori in her cell.

  * Neferteri looks at her daughter, she stares back, as if looking for trouble.  
  * Neferteri remains speechless. She wants to say something, but she is having a harder time to formulate the words. She turned around.  
  * “Why am I still here?” Eori flat out asked.  
  * Neferteri stopped. She did not turn back around. “You killed Huneo. Do you realize your actions?”  
  * “I KILLED HARRY COUNTLESS OF TIMES\! WHAT’S THE DIFFERENCE” Eori sharply replied.  
  * Neferteri. “One of them was considered an experimental subject.” She began walking away. “That was until I saw you unnecessarily mutilating his corpse.”  
  * Eori's anger rises as she seems to have realized she lost her last defense subject. Now everyone turned on her, and Harry.

* ## Itagiba & Neferteri. 

  * // TODO They talk about Eori

# **Chapter 3 \- The power of Teamwork**

* ## Dalila, with her parents, and two adventurer with a Winga in one of them.

  * Her father is an older gentleman  
  * Dalila “Mom\! Can we stop by Jackwood?”  
  * Mom grabs her round cheeks “Anything for my little chubby”  
  * Dalila gets flustered and pushes her hands away “You’re embarrassing me\!”  
  * A scream echoes through the air, silencing everyone. The birds fly, and the egua gets spooked. The dad controls, and calms down the egua.  
  * Adventurer “What was that?”  
  * Adventurer “Who knows. Can we speed up?”  
  * Dad does so. “Let’s deliver to Banhia, and stay the night before making ways to Rebula.”  
  * Adventurer let’s Winga go up. It flies above the trees, looks around, and starts barking repeatedly as it makes its way back. “Speed it up\! There’s something dangerous coming\!”  
  * Dad “I can’t go any faster\!”  
  * Adventurer “I’m gonna Create Hail.”  
  * Other adventurer “All right. I will do Decrease Gravity on the cart, then prepare a shock.”  
  * They do so. Winga’s voice grows louder, and faster.  
  * Dalila readies a sigil ring. “I wanna do Ice\!”  
  * Adventurer “Fine by me. Make sure to release it after us\!”  
  * Dalila prepares the spell  
  * They all see something rush through the forest, and jump towards them.

* ## Dalila sees Harry \#11 face-to-face as she released her spell.

  * Dalila released the spell she was holding.  
  * Another adventurer struck his sword deep into Harry, then noticed a lot of soul Energy flame pour out of the wound  
  * Harry tore through the wagon, sending everyone flying around.  
  * The adventurers, and Harry fight some more. They go all out.   
  * Harry begins to appear like he is dying, he suffers as he begins tearing his own flesh, it’s starting to heal slower. The fire in his head swallows up, and he exploded.

* ## Harry, exploding fire as his soul weakens, Dalila’s father protecting Dalila

  * Everyone has a hard time dealing with the explosion. Dalila is protected by her father. Dalila wakes up in tree branches. Her body does not move.  
  * She sees the last adventurer battle Harry as he dies at Harry’s hand.  
  * Blood drips from her. She blinks and sees Harry gone. She tries to find him, but her fussy eyes can’t. She blinks again and sses wild animals eating her parents.  
  * She cries, but her face won't move. A single tear falls from her eyes and meets blood before falling from the branch she is in.  
  * Dalila passed away before the tear touched the ground.

# **Chapter 4 \- Soul Climax**

* ## Farm. Black Magina girl chewing on the flowers, getting fucked by the guy.

  * She is high on sedatives. The guy stops fucking her, and pushes her on the bed. She flops about. She tries to get up, but her body does not quite respond to her.  
  * The guy dresses himself up, and grabs his weapon and leaves.  
  * The girl, crying, tries to move herself back to the flowers on top of the desk. She flails around, as screams and fights happen outside. She stands up, but falls forward against the tables. She grabs all the flowers and shoves into her mouth.  
  * She smiles, and tries to get up, only to hobble and fall on the floor.  
  * She chews on the flowers as the sounds of screams, and the fight draws even closer. She lays her arms wide open, staring vacantly at the ceiling.  
  * A loud fire roared outside, followed by a  clash against the wall that did not even scare her, nor the bookshelf as it came crashing down on her.   
  * Her exposed hand shows remnants of flower petals, as blood pours out.

* ## Farm Magina guy, standing up after being struck against the wall. Back of Harry appears on shot, he is nearly spent.

  * Everything is on fire. Magina guy stands up. “What the fuck are you?”  
  * Someone on the bg “Magina guy\! Watch out\!”  
  * A spell launches towards Harry, and magina guy, blinding both temporarily.   
  * Magina guy “You fucing arsehole\!” His vision comes back ,and he sees people stabbing Harry, as he is driven back.  
  * Magina guy. “Hold him back\!” He prepares a Body destroy spell.  
  * Magina guy. “GET OUT\! ” he launches the spell against Harry. It splashes on his belly, and creates waves of liquifying flesh, bones & skin falling into the floor, with soul Flame around.  
  * Everyone sits back. The Magina guy stabs his sword on the floor. “Find who sent—”  
  * Harry's soul flame amidst the pool of liquified flesh lit up in Soul flame.   
  * They see the pool splitting up evenly.  
  * “There’s something\!”

* ## Bagarisa's body coming out from within the pile of goo.

  * They threw spells, and everything they could, but that only fed the fire. They had no idea what the fuck they were doing. They saw the Bagarisa body slowly forming from the pile of goo. Suddenly, a fire roared with a bright light that blinded everyone.  
  * The light was so bright that even with your eyes closed, it still felt like staring at the sun.   
  * The Magina guy steps back, and an explosion occurs, sending him, or rather a chunk of his body, and everyone else arounds flying everywhere. The pressure wave then destroys everything else, while putting all the flames around. Everything grew quiet.

# **Chapter 5 \- Friends With A Handful of Benefits.**

* ## Ryo spots a girl walking through a forest, like a zombie. Afternoon

  * Ryo stops the wagon. He tries to talk with her, but she only calls her sister before collapsing over Ryo.  
  * Ryo. “Get me some Nari gel. ASAP\!”  
  * Katsumi wakes up. She pushes herself away from Ryo.  
  * Ryo “What happened to you?”  
  * Katsumi takes off running.  
  * Ryo “KATSUMI\!”  
  * Katsumi stops and goes to Ryo, ready to punch him in the face when his adventurer guard stops her.  
  * She falls on the ground.  
  * Ryo “Hey X\! No need to get aggressive.”  
  * The adventurer does not reply.  
  * Ryo extends his hand to the short-hair sister. “I’m willing to help a stranger, if you pay me back in full.”  
  * Katsumi. “I don't’ have balls”  
  * Ryo “Who said I need money?”  
  * Katsumi “So what? You gonna fuck me in the ass, while calling me a whore like the others?”  
  * Ryo puts on a lewd smile. “I don’t like to call people names. I guess I am the silent type. Plus, you could just start with your hand, then we move on to the others.” He further extends his hand.  
  * Katsumi gives a slight smile back. She takes his hand.  
  * “I’m Ryo XXX. Pleasure of service.”  
  * “I'm a Katsumi. I need help saving my sister from a Magina field.”

* ## Katsumi and Ryo. Afternoon

  * They are talking about Magina guys. Ryo has dealt with him in the past. He gets pretty crabby at times, but still a reasonable guy.  
  * Ryo. “So your sister looks just like you?”  
  * Ryo then proposes that if they tell him everything they know about Red Winga, and all the people they acquired info from, then Ryo would keep them hidden away while trying to negotiate a contract cancellation.  
  * Adventurer looks as if he is trying to actively not listen. “Watch out\!”  
  * Ryo stops the wagon. Several Bagarisas travel across the street, all seemingly rushing away from something.  
  * Ryo “That’s a really big pack.”  
  * Katsumi “What are you gonna do with it?”  
  * Ryo. “Make us some balls, of course\!”  
  * Katsumi “Us?”  
  * Ryo: “But of course\! I plan to give you and her things other than a daily dose of my genes.” A lewd smile appears on him again. “But if that’s all you want, then I can gladly provide.”  
  * Katsumi “If you save my sister, I will show you everything I learned from Red Winga.”  
  * Ryo. “Everything?”  
  * Katsumi comes closer to Ryo. “E—ve—ry—thing.” she said in a sensual voice.

* ## Ryo, Adventurer & Katsumi coming across a broken wagon in the middle of the road, evening.

  * Adventurer “We need to go back right now\!”  
  * Short-haired “No\! We can't be around\! Do you know what they are doing to her?”  
  * Adventurer “It doesn’t matter if we all die\! I can’t protect you both\!”  
  * Ryo comes closer, and stops the wagon right by the broken wagon. “This is not normal\! Look\! There’s blood everywhere, and even the Egua is gone.” Ryo slaps the egua into full speed. “We can’t stop until we arrive\! You two, we are already in danger\! Keep your eyes on the back and behind of the wagon\!”  
  * Adventurer “Impossible\! No wild animal would do that, except”  
  * Ryo “A bandit group trying to appear as wild animals. I can work out a deal with the Magina guy to keep us safe.”  
  * The explosion happens.  
  * Adventurer “That’s ominous.”  
  * Ryo, “It's fine. Whatever was happening must have ended with a bang. Magina guy must have taken care of it. Let’s go see\!”

* ## Ryo, Katsumi and adventurer. All arriving at the farm at night. Smoke billows out of the houses. Small fires everywhere

  * They approach, and see everything is recently demolished. They see blood, and chunks of body everywhere.  
  * Katsumi looks distraught. Adventurer confused, while Ryo looks curious.  
  * Ryo “Maybe one of them is Magina guy?”  
  * Adventurer “I’m not gonna heal bandits\! That’s where I draw the line”  
  * Ryo “I never said that\! So, where do you think she is?”  
  * Katsumi “In the bedroom\!”  
  * Ryo approaches. They talk about it, and the adventurer helps with gravity control.  
  * Katsumi pulls the body of her sister, and they leave.  
  * Ryo tries to grab some stuff, but Adventurer denies as that’s too much.  
  * Ryo says fine, and they take off to Forway.

# **Chapter 6 \- Scared Forest**

* ## Rebula village

  * Guy cutting up wood. The forest is making all kinds of noises. The guy stops and listens to the wind. He throws the axe to the side, and goes inside, to his wife.  
  * Wife “You finished already?”  
  * Husband “No. The forest keeps getting spooked by something.”  
  * Wife. “Bad weather coming?”  
  * Husband gets something to drink. “Maybe? Seems to be in the season for those storms, but the forest feels wrong.”  
  * Their son appears. “Mom\! Dad\! Look at what I found\!...”  
  * They intermingle, then the guy brings the kid outside to chop firewood with him. They leave the house.  
  * Kid is getting ready to chop the firewood, when a screech is heard in the distance.  
  * Severino gets serious. He hears the forest fauna going crazy, he sees birds, and other animals flying away from something North of them.  
  * “Dad?” Vitor asks, as he is ready to chop wood.  
  * Severino gets to his son's level, and grabs his shoulder. “Son, I need your help.”  
  * Son pumps his chest, already.  
  * Severino. “I need you to bring the bell, and pound on it at the center of the village. Tell people to gather their Fost stone, and weapons.”

* ## Rebula, with several men with their weapons, and Fost stone posted. Takeo in Egua horseback near them.

  * Takeo “You guys playing fort, or what?”  
  * Severino “You didn’t hear?”  
  * Takeo eyebrows move around as a film of his day replays on his head. “Something about bandits?”  
  * Severino. “No\! There was this loud screech that happened once in the afternoon\! We think it came from the North.”  
  * Takeo “That explains it to them, I came from Deltacross. Do you guys have any food to sell? I couldn’t catch anything today.”  
  * Severino. “Are the animals too spoked?”  
  * Takeo “Yeah\! How did you know?”  
  * Severino “Because I saw them fleeing.”  
  * Takeo “So you guys are preparing to flee too?”  
  * Rubela “To where? This is our home\!” the men in the background cheer. “We're gonna kick its teeth in\!”  
  * Takeo “Well, if you feed me & give me a place to sleep for tonight, I can help too.”  
  * Rubela “You sure about that? What if Forway finds out?”  
  * Takeo “Will anyone tell?” The Takeo peeked through the crowd. Everyone shook their heads. With a smile he said, “Then all good. Say, do you guys have a-many-husband policy yor what?”  
  * Severino “What does that have to do with anything?”  
  * Takeo “Just curious, there’s like 10 guys for every woman here.”  
  * Severino. “I see what you are saying. Most of the women & children are hidden away in the barrack behind us.”  
  * Takeo “Got it. You guys—”

* ## Explosion of light in the distance that made the evening as bright as day

  * Takeo & Severino alongside a group of men with some women seeing the fission explosion in the distance.  
  * Everyone fell silent, as they struggled to see again.  
  * Takeo “Fuck\! My eyes\! They hurt\!”  
  * Severino. “Anyone can see? Shit\!”  
  * A loud, and fierce gust of air clapped through the village. Some people fell over, some trees broke down, pieces of branches, pieces of the house, and even small mammals were taken over by the wind and sent flying.  
  * Takeo stood up, and cleaned his robes, “Pheww. That’s over.”  
  * Severino coughs up dirt as he stands from a ways. “What makes you say that?”  
  * Takeo “That’s what I heard from Sapphire Adventurers. The explosion matches up to the Hifuna beasts when they reach the end of their lives. We should go check it out\! And if we are the first ones, can I claim to be the one who slayed it? I’m very close to the Sapphire promotion.”  
  * Severino “Well, if you protect us, then have at it.”  
  * Takeo extends a handshake. They shake hands firmly.

* ## Rebula people Takeo arriving at Farm. Bagarisa in the distance, eating Harry’s body.

  * They are using Fost stones to illuminate. They see a wild animal feasting on a body.  
  * The animal turns on them. They fight off a large Bagarisa. It kills some of them, but they manage to fight it off.   
  * When did Bagarisas become so violent?  
  * Takeo “That was the Hifuna beast.”  
  * Severino “We can’t leave these people behind\!”  
  * Takeo “They are bandits\!” he points at some slightly burned Maginas.  
  * Severino “They are innocent people\! I told Forway about this farm, and how they were kidnapping, but you guys never did anything\!”  
  * Takeo “Well, that’s cause you never set the right price\!”  
  * Severino “Like we have the money\!”  
  * Takeo “I know. I’m not arguing with you. But you gotta understand our side too. It costs a lot\!”  
  * Severino “Then what are you gonna do?”  
  * Takeo offers his hand up, with a carefree expression “You guys offered me a place to stay the night—I can’t be that much of a backward ass. He holds his badge up high. “Let’s play puzzle\! You guys have Black Honey, right?”  
  * Severino. “Not much, but the other villages can pitch in.”  
  * Takeo “Well—we can look around. This clandestine Magina plantation must be hiding a few treasures too.They are bandits after all.”  
  * Severino. “There’s a lot of bodies to take care of, we need all the balls we can get. Everyone agreed?”  
  * Murmurs among the populace, nobody felt like being a contrarian, specially surrounded by a sea of dead bodies.

# **Epilogue**

* ## Harry stuck in limbo, sleeping with the bagarisas

  * Ends with Harry being separated by darkness between him and the bagarisas. Harry tries to run towards them, but the split is too strong, then a bright light hits him.
